sourceMovie.title: eXistenZ
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: eXistenZ works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Terminator
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If eXistenZ clicked for you, The Terminator (1984) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If eXistenZ clicked for you, Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after eXistenZ?
faq.answer: Try The Terminator, Terminator 2: Judgment Day, The Island—each shares DNA with eXistenZ while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is eXistenZ?
faq.answer: eXistenZ (1999) is best described as Action, Thriller, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is eXistenZ worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
